nasb.text: He also took all the fat that was on the entrails and the lobe of the liver, and the two kidneys and their fat; and Moses offered it up in smoke on the altar.

esv.text: And he took all the fat that was on the entrails and the long lobe of the liver and the two kidneys with their fat, and Moses burned them on the altar.

cnv.text: 摩西取出內臟上所有的脂肪、腎旁的肝葉、兩個腎和腎上的脂肪，焚燒在祭壇上。

ccb.text: 他取出遮盖内脏的脂肪、肝叶、两个肾脏和肾脏上的脂肪，放在坛上焚烧，
